case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFICE VS. GENE LAICO CONTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARIN FOSTER. DEFENDANT GENE LAICO CONSTRUCTION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT GENE LAICO CONSRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARIN FOSTER. DEFENDANT GENE LAICO CONSTRUCTION IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A DISMISSAL AS THE MATTER HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-10-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-18-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
